title: macrolobium bifolium
intro: Macrolobium bifolium, also known as the two-leafed Macrolobium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It is a tree native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and antifungal properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating respiratory issues like coughs and bronchitis. The medicinal properties of Macrolobium bifolium are often extracted through herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
